title: Finesse Mastery
summary: Finesse branches between disciplined pathfinding and razor-edged positional combat. The mobile fighter wins by choosing where and when to engage — not by hitting harder.

thresholds.title: First Step
thresholds.description: Choose how you move through danger.

thresholds.title: Charted Routes
thresholds.description: Your movement habits become more intentional.

thresholds.title: Shadowstep
thresholds.description: Late mastery cements your command of distance and approach.

nodes.title: Trail Marks
nodes.description: Favors reliable navigation and route memory.

nodes.title: Wanderer's Instinct
nodes.description: Favors curiosity, detours, and awareness of hidden approaches.

nodes.title: Measured Stride
nodes.description: Deepens pathfinding into controlled long-distance travel and reduced fall impact.

nodes.title: Hidden Waypoints
nodes.description: Deepens evasion into better off-route awareness and positional burst.

nodes.title: Cartographer's Focus
nodes.description: Commits to reliable traversal and speed while sprinting.

nodes.title: Frontier Sense
nodes.description: Commits to positional awareness and threat-reading on the move.
